subcodes.first_line: O My Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of the children of My Friend and the heirs of Him Who conversed with God, with whom God speaketh openly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلمی الاعلی ان اذکر ابناء خلیلی و وراث کلیمی الذین یکلمهم الله ظاهرا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proclamation to Jews, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action
